message:
Running command: # Empty log - OpenROAD is still loading the ODB.
# The ODB from step 34 (post-DRT) is 136MB+ so loading takes time.
# Let's check if it's actually running or sleeping
cat /proc/625425/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "VmRSS|VmPeak|State" | head -3
